text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The summer training camp begins, a time
dedicated to improving even further.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Horsegirls experience tremendous growth
during the summer. That's why Tracen
Academy holds these camps, to focus entirely
on intensive training.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Trainer!
Let's make this summer camp count!
choice_data_list: Yeah. I'm not going easy on you.
Yeah. I'm not going easy on you.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, bring it on! Once summer's over, the
Shuka Sho will be right around the corner…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
If we want to see that incredible view, then we
have to make victory certain. I'm gonna give it
everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista's full of determination. There's no
sign of the uneasiness I sensed after the Oaks.
…Maybe I was just imagining things.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Buena. Good day to you♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Desire, good day to you too!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hey, could it be… you're in a really good mood
today?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Indeed! Thanks to that, I am feeling wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
This summer, I intend to push myself even
further… to cast myself into hardship… and
refine my strength.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Until I can reach "that place". To do so is to
become a true saint…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: By surpassing you.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…It is an honor to compete with you again in
the Shuka Sho. Please take care of your health.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Desire.
Something about her… felt different.
choice_data_list: Yeah… her presence is so refined now.
Yeah… her presence is so refined now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rumor has it that since the Oaks, she's been
undergoing unbelievably intense training.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah……

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: (By surpassing you.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
—……
…Whew.
…Whew…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Ah, the luggage!
I'll go carry the rest over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing moving our things for camp,
we decide to take a walk around the area first.
Partly to get ourselves excited for training camp.
choice_data_list: Man, it really is hot out here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seriously…!
We've gotta be careful not to overheat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'll probably be cooler by the time the Shuka
Sho comes around… but we still can't let our
guard down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something about her responses feels slightly
off… yet Buena Vista's expression remains
bright. Even with that lingering unease,
I continue the casual conversation.
choice_data_list: By then, even the ocean will look different.
By then, even the ocean will look different.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
True! And strategy changes depending on the
course too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Kyoto Racecourse has a shorter final stretch…
With my usual late-running style, there's a
chance they could get away from me, right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
It'd be ideal if I could switch tactics smoothly
depending on how the race unfolds… in that
case…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hm?
choice_data_list: Is racing all you can think about right now?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait… I was just talking normally,
wasn't I?
choice_data_list: (I see… she's not even aware of it.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about racing nonstop… No, feeling
like she's thinking about it too much… Could
this be a sign that something inside her is
changing? And the trigger was…
choice_data_list: (She talked with Red Desire just now…)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After speaking with her, Buena Vista briefly
showed that same habit she has whenever she
feels uneasy. But… something still doesn't
quite add up.
choice_data_list: (What matters is what Buena herself felt…)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's an incredibly sensitive horsegirl. When
she's strongly affected by the atmosphere
around her, her emotions can be stirred up
intensely.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Y-Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Huh? Different how…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Well… her presence definitely felt sharper…
But also…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Hot.
I guess that's how it felt.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
When Desire's "I'm not going to lose!" starts
reaching me… it feels like flames suddenly
spreading outward.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ah… I think I felt the same thing back at the
racecourse too.
choice_data_list: Could it have been after the Oaks?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! When everyone's excited voices started
crashing together all at once…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
It spread through my heart in an instant!
Like this blazing fire…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So… that's why…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
For the Shuka Sho, I think I should race more
aggressively. Instead of waiting for my moment…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The thing influencing Buena Vista… is
powerful excitement itself. The excitement of
the crowd, the racers… all of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The frenzy surrounding the Oaks was on an
entirely different level than before. And being
swept up in all that excitement has probably
overwhelmed her emotions…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
That's why, Trainer. For the Shuka Sho, I want
to make bolder moves! Take the lead more
aggressively, or maybe even go wire-to-wire…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having strong fighting spirit isn't a bad thing.
But the excitement surrounding the Shuka
Sho will probably surpass anything she's
experienced yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And if Buena Vista gets swept up in that
overwhelming excitement again… then surely,
her emotional balance will collapse, and she
won't be able to race the way she wants.
choice_data_list: (I need to help her relax… somehow.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Simple breathing exercises probably won't be
enough anymore. She needs some way to fully
release all the excitement that's built up inside
her…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah! Buena, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hello!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's like this every year, but wow…
It really is hot out here～…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Training's probably tough in this weather,
but do your best, okay? I'll bring back souvenirs
for you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yep! This year, I'm wrapping up camp early
and heading back home to Hokkaido♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …! Hokkaido…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that sounds amazing～ It must be so
cool there…!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe～ After working so hard on the front
lines all this time, it's my little reward to
myself! I'm gonna completely forget about
this hot, humid summer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the blazing summer training camp…
or rather, the not blazing summer training camp,
begins!
